zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Harte於1378年出生在英國素福爾可阿爾德包時，他的父親Thomas Harte28歲，母親Mrs Thomas Harte24歲。他於1402年與Mrs Edward Harte在英國素福爾可阿爾德包結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1405年在英國素福爾可波享年27歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可波。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Harte于1378年出生在英国素福爾可阿爾德包时，他的父亲Thomas Harte28岁，母亲Mrs Thomas Harte24岁。他于1402年与Mrs Edward Harte在英国素福爾可阿爾德包结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1405年在英国素福爾可波享年27岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可波。

nameMeanings.name: Harte
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Sinead.
English and North German: variant of   Hart   1.

variants.name: Hart
meanings: English and North German: nickname from Middle English hert (Old English heorot), Middle Low German hërte, harte ‘hart, stag’, perhaps for a quick-footed or timorous individual.
German: variant of   Hardt   1 and 2. It is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine).
Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name or nickname from German and Yiddish hart ‘hard’.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Harte was born in 1378, in Aldeburgh, Suffolk, England, his father, Thomas Harte, was 28 and his mother, Mrs Thomas Harte, was 24. He married Mrs Edward Harte in 1402, in Aldeburgh, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1405, in Burgh, Suffolk, England, at the age of 27, and was buried in Burgh, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Harte est né en 1378, à Aldeburgh, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Harte, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mrs Thomas Harte, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Edward Harte en 1402, à Aldeburgh, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1405, à Burgh, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterré à Burgh, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Harte 1378 in Aldeburgh, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Harte 28 und seine Mutter Mrs Thomas Harte 24. Er hat 1402 in Aldeburgh, Suffolk, England Mrs Edward Harte geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1405 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Burgh, Suffolk, England und wurde in Burgh, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Harte è nato il nel 1378 nel Aldeburgh, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Thomas Harte, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Thomas Harte, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Edward Harte nel 1402, nel Aldeburgh, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1405, nel Burgh, Suffolk, England, all'età di 27 anni, e fu sepolto a Burgh, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Harteが1378年にイギリススフォルクアルデブルグで生まれた時，父Thomas Harteは28歳，母Mrs Thomas Harteは24歳であった。1402年にイギリススフォルクアルデブルグでMrs Edward Harteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1405年にイギリススフォルクブルグで27歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Harte(이)가 1378년 영국 수폴크 알데버그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Harte(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Thomas Harte(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1402년 영국 수폴크 알데버그h에서 Mrs Edward Harte(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1405년 영국 수폴크 버그h에서 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 버그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Harte nasceu em 1378, em Aldeburgh, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Harte, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Thomas Harte, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Edward Harte em 1402, em Aldeburgh, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1405, em Burgh, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 27 anos, e foi sepultado em Burgh, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Harte родился в 1378 г. в местности алдебург, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Harte было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Thomas Harte, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Edward Harte в 1402 г. в местности алдебург, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1405 г. в местности бург, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 27 лет и был похоронен в местности бург, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Harte nació en 1378, en Aldeburgh, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Harte, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mrs Thomas Harte, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Mrs Edward Harte en 1402, en Aldeburgh, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1405, en Burgh, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 27 años, y fue sepultado en Burgh, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
